title: AI & Machine Learning
description: A curated database of premium learning resources to master mathematics for ML, classical algorithms, neural networks, deep learning, and transformers.

categories.name: Mathematics & Data Foundations
categories.description: Master linear algebra, calculus, probability, and statistics needed for machine learning.

resources.name: Essence of Linear Algebra
resources.description: An incredibly intuitive, highly visual introduction to matrices, vectors, determinants, and eigenvectors that makes linear algebra clear and simple.

resources.name: Kaggle Pandas Tutorial
resources.description: Hands-on, notebook-based tutorial teaching data manipulation, cleaning, and aggregation using the Python Pandas library.

categories.name: Classical Machine Learning
categories.description: Learn predictive modeling, classification, regression, clustering, and data preprocessing.

resources.name: Machine Learning Specialization
resources.description: The gold-standard introduction to machine learning. Covers supervised algorithms (regression, logistic classification), neural networks, decision trees, unsupervised learning, and practical ML pipeline advice.

resources.name: StatQuest Machine Learning Videos
resources.description: Breaks down complex statistics and machine learning concepts (such as SVMs, Random Forests, XGBoost, and PCA) into small, simple, and beautifully visual explanations.

categories.name: Deep Learning & Modern AI
categories.description: Build neural networks, train computer vision models, and master transformers and large language models (LLMs).

resources.name: Practical Deep Learning for Coders
resources.description: A brilliant 'top-down' course that teaches deep learning by training state-of-the-art computer vision and text models immediately, before diving into underlying matrix calculus and architecture details.

resources.name: The Hugging Face NLP Course
resources.description: The ultimate course for mastering modern Natural Language Processing. Covers using pre-trained Transformer models, tokenizers, fine-tuning models on custom datasets, and deploying models to production.

resources.name: Neural Networks Deep Dive
resources.description: An unmatched 4-part visual series detailing what a neural network actually is, how it processes data, and the mathematical mechanics of backpropagation.
